content: Node.js fs.cpSync defaults verbatimSymlinks:false which resolves relative symlinks into absolute paths at source location — breaks strict path-validation extractors. Use verbatimSymlinks:true to preserve relative symlinks. Symlinks pointing outside project directory can copy sensitive content into dist (path traversal). No TOCTOU-safe symlink traversal in pure Node without native addons. readdirSync order is platform-dependent: Linux appears sorted but isn't guaranteed, Windows not sorted. Always sort explicitly for deterministic output.
